title: MCP Management Crash Fixes — Revision 2
consumer_purpose: Fix P0 data-loss, P0 nested-dialog portal crash, and P1/P2 UX gaps in the MCP management dialog UI
claim_atoms: addMutation persists to electron-store matching onSave pattern
DialogEditMcp renders as panel (no nested Dialog portal)
handleEdit falls back to sync.data.mcp when electron-store has no entry
All CRUD error paths show user-visible toasts
handleSave validates URL for remote type
revision_notes: Revision 2: Narrowed scope to 5 fixes after critic rejection of previous plan. Removed FI-002 (already fixed) and 'unified data source' (overlaps Lane 1). Added MCP-006 (addMutation persistence - the P0 bug) and MCP-007 (nested dialog portal). Reordered apply_order to put fix-B (portal) first since fix-D depends on it. Added deferred seams section. Explicit file_summary showing unchanged files.
